title: DOM environment setup for Mermaid and SVG polyfills
purpose: Initializes a JSDOM environment with required DOM globals and SVG polyfills needed for Mermaid rendering in server-side contexts.
module_context: Creates a JSDOM instance and patches global DOM objects including document, window, and navigator. Also imports and initializes DOMPurify for isomorphic use and adds SVG bounding box polyfills.

steps.content: Create a new JSDOM instance with basic HTML document structure.
Extract the window object from the JSDOM instance.
Assign the window, document, and navigator objects to the global scope.
Import and initialize DOMPurify for secure DOM manipulation.
Add polyfill for SVGElement getBBox method if not present.
Add polyfill for SVGGraphicsElement if not present.
Export the window and document references for use in other modules.
